# Satvik Chachra - AI Native Full Stack Engineer

> Satvik Chachra is an AI Native Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience. He specializes in building AI coding agents, full-stack software, developer tooling, and the platform infrastructure that makes them production-ready.

## Technical Focus & Stack
- AI / ML: AI Agents, Agentic Systems, LLM Applications, RAG (learning), MLOps, Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agent Client Protocol (ACP)
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Rust (learning)
- Frontend: React, NextJS, Redux, Tanstack, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
- Backend: NodeJS, MongoDB, WebSockets, FastAPI, Flask, Redis, Firebase
- Cloud / Infra: CI/CD, Bitbucket Pipelines, GitHub Actions, Docker, Vercel
- Tools / APIs: Vitest, Playwright, VS Code APIs, JetBrains APIs, Tecton, Stripe, Git

## Professional Background
- SDE 2, AI Foundations at Atlassian (2025-present) - Building AI coding agents, full-stack software, developer tooling and infrastructure used by 2K+ engineers daily. Led end-to-end development of MCP Integration into AI Coding Agent, AI-native Editor and Agentic Chat experience across VS Code and JetBrains with ~95% shared code.
- SDE 1, Dev Infra at Atlassian (2024-2025) - Worked on ML-driven Predictive Test Case Selection System for CI/CD pipelines. Drove a ~99% improvement in p95 prediction API latency (60s → 500ms) through Tecton feature store integration, Redis caching, and FastAPI migration.
- SDE 1, Full Stack at AppyHigh (2022-2023) - Built AI-powered Image Editing and Generation Platform (PhotAI) and a Cloud-based Storage and document conversion platform (ScannerGo). Led small engineering teams and shipped products to 1M+ users.

## Awards
- Brainiac Award (Feb 2023) for client-side canvas algorithms (pixel manipulation + B&W API masks) for PhotAI's AI Background Remover Tool.
- Letter of Appreciation (Jan 2023) for driving 3x performance improvement, and optimizing Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, and CLS) via code-splitting, caching, etc.
- Talent Star Award (Sep 2022) for building ScannerGo's Redux architecture for Cloud Storage and Socket-based real-time file conversions.

## Content Structure
- [Home](/) : High-level overview of professional wins and experience
- [About](/about) : Detailed technical background, stack, education, and awards
- [Projects](/projects) : Deep dives into selected technical projects (AI agents, full-stack software products, developer tooling, platform infrastructure, intelligent systems, etc.)
- [Blog](/blog) : Engineering case studies, explorations of AI Agents and intelligent systems, LLMs, ML, AI, CS, distributed systems, math, and physics

## Education
- Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science - Chitkara University (2018-2022, 9.83/10 CGPA)
